titleStmt.title: SII 5.705: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 705. (A.R. No. 141 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pū mannu patumam pūtta Eḻulakum tāmun ceytavattāl paruti vaḻittoṉṟi neṭumā livaneṉa cuṭarmuṭi cūṭi Irunila makaḷai Urimaiyil puṇarn tu tirumakaḷ paṇaimulai ceñcān taṇaintu parumaṇi Āram panivarai nikaṟpa jayamakaḷ ceḻumcantaṉac cuvaṭṭāl puya mirukaiyi
laip poruppeṉat tonṟi nāmakaḷ tāṉum comakaḷ cevvāyp pavaḻac ceyyoḷi paṭaittaṉa niyāneṉa tavaḷanaṉiṟat tanittuyaiyeneṉa pukaḻmati cintai makuḻu nāḷilum Oru kuṭainilavu porupaṭait tikiri veleṉuṅ karuṅkali yiruḷinait turappa nīṭupal lūḻi Eḻkaṭalp puṟattiṉum ko
ṭāt tanikko linitulāva mīnamum citaittu vāṉuyar poṉneṭu meruviṟ puli viṟṟiruppa Umpariyānai Oreṭṭiṉukkum tampameṉnat tanittani ticaitoṟum vicaiyastambha niṟpa pacipakai Ātiyākiya vīcu taṇpuṉalum metini vaḷaṉum jāti yoḻukkamum nīti yaṟamum piḻaṟātuRead piṟaḻātu.nikaḻ pāvum paḻapparappum
paṇaikkai māvu mallatu vaṉṟalai paṭutal kaṉaviluṅ kāṇṭaṟ kariteṉa varun=ti punalilum palaveṟu puḷḷilu mallatu ciṟaiyenappaṭuta liṉṟi pallavar teluṅkar māḷavar kaliṅkar teṉnar kaṉnaṭar kaṭārar coḷar ciṅkaḷar toṅkaṇar [śrī]hasta r Aṅkar vaṅka(ra)r mattamattirar kaṅkar jona
kar kaikaiyar jinareṉ ṟaṟaikaḻalventar mallāvaracaru muṟaimaiyil varinta tiṟaikuṇan tiṟain=taRead tiṟaiñca.Ampon malaṟkoṭi cempiyankiḻānaṭi yorumaruṅ kuṭanamarnatiruppa Aruḷpuri camaiyap poṟkoṭi yimaiyappāvaiyum civanumpol puvanamuḻutuṭaiyā(ḷ)ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirā jakecaripatma rāna tribhuvanacakra vattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
kacoḷade vaṟku yāṇṭu 9 Āvatu mutal kāṇipeṟṟapaṭikku pāṇaṉ Irumuṭicoḻan pirānāṉa Acañcalapperaya(n)nukku Uyyakkoṇṭaārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṟku pāṭavum Ikkoyilil taḷiyillār tev(ā)raṭiyārai pāṭṭuvikkavum pāṇarai Iṭakkaṭava(n)nāka Ivanukkum Ivan vaṅ
śa ttāṟkum Ikkoyil pāṇapeṟāka munpu peṟṟuvarum kācum nellum Uḷpaṭa yāṇṭu Onpatāvatu mutal nāḷ Onṟukku Ūrkkā(l)lāl nel kalamāka vanta nellu Ikkoyilil palapaṇi nivantakkāṟaroṭuṅ kūṭa nivantaṅ kaṭṭi Innellukku veṇṭum nilam munnuṭaiyārai tavirttu Ittevar tevatānamāna Ūr
ka(ḷ)ḷi(l)le pāṇakāṇiyum nila jivitamumāka Aṭaittu munpu pāṇar kuṭiyiruppāna maṉaiyum Ivanukku viṭṭu Ippaṭikku kalveṭṭi koḷvatāka Onpatāvatu mutal prasāda m peṟṟamaikku prasā tañ cetaruḷina tirumukam malaiyappirāyarum tirumantira Olai putukkuṭaiyārum Eḻuttiṭṭa tirumukappaṭiyum puro
vari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi neṭumaṇamuṭaiyānum purovari śrīkaraṇanāyakam ponnuḻānum purovari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi paṇṇainallūruṭaiyānum purovari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi veḷārkiḻavanum purovari śrīkaraṇamukaveṭṭi Aracūruṭaiyānum purovari śrīkaraṇanāyakam ceṟṟūruṭaiyānum purovarikkūṟu paṅkaḷarāyarum ciṅkaḷarāyarum vayanāṭṭaraiya
rum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvarippaṭi Ittevar tevatānamāna Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu tiraimurnāṭṭu cempiyankuḷattūril kulottuṅkacoḻavatikku kiḻakku muñcikkaṇṇāṟṟukku teṟku kiṭāraṅkoṇṭacoḻavatikku meṟku tarāppaḷḷakkaṇṭattukku vaṭakku naṭuviṟkaṇṭattu nilam Onṟe mukkāle Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraiyum Itan teṟku kiṭāraṅko
ṇṭacoḻavatikku meṟku brahma teyam tirai[mu(r) rellai]kku vaṭakku pāmpuṇikiḻān nilattukku kiḻakku nilam mukkāle nālumā Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āka nilam Iraṇṭaraiye nālumāk kāṇi Araikkāṇi kiḻaraikku nilavopātiyāl nel munnūṟṟu nāṟpattonpatin kalattinā luṟaināḻi yeṟṟi nel munnūṟṟaṟupatin kalattukkum
Ivai koyiṟkaṇakkuk kuṇṭaiyūrkiḻava neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai tevarkanmi tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīkāriyam mulaṅkuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai tiruviti Anpaṟkaracin Eḻuttu yāṇṭu 6 vatu cempiyankuḷattūril tārāppaḷḷacaṇṭattu pāmpuṇikiḻān nilattukku kiḻakku munpu Uṟai
nāḻi nellukkenṟu nikki pinpu pukunta nilam �yum Āka nilam Iraṇṭemukkāle Orumāvarai Araikkāṇiyināl nel munnūṟṟaṟupatin kalattālum I vai k Oyiṟkaṇakku kuṇṭaiyūrkiḻava neḻuttu Ippaṭikku I vai tevarkanmi tirucciṟṟampalapaṭṭa neḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai śrīkāriyam mulaṅkuṭaiyā(n) neḻuttu Ippaṭikku I
vai śrīmāheśva ra kaṇkāṇi tiruvāti Anpaṟkaraci(n) neḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 5.705 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
